ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was last updated */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of test */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storage system being tested */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES storage_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test associated with these parameters */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the data being processed */,
  "f" INTEGER /* Frequency parameter used in the test */,
  "threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the test */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being processed */,
  "io_type" TEXT /* Type of I/O operation */,
  "concurrency" INTEGER /* Number of concurrent operations */,
  "cache_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cache used during the test */,
  "compression" INTEGER /* Whether data compression is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameters for the test this result is associated with */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "io_allocation" REAL /* I/O allocation during the test execution */,
  "read_speed" REAL /* Read speed during the test */,
  "write_speed" REAL /* Write speed during the test */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during the test */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the system during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test associated with this log */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message providing information about the test */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storage system */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the storage system */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the storage system */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the storage system was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the storage system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storage system used */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameters used in the test */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Details about the configuration */,
  "cache_policy" TEXT /* Cache policy used during the test */,
  "raid_level" TEXT /* RAID level configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES test_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES storage_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each results summary */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test associated with this summary */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of tests conducted */,
  "average_io_allocation" REAL /* Average I/O allocation during tests */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the tests */,
  "max_duration" REAL /* Maximum duration of the tests */,
  "min_duration" REAL /* Minimum duration of the tests */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_summary_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test associated with this notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was sent */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)
